data.title: CGI renews its Normal Course Issuer Bid, stock market symbols GIB.A (TSX) GIB (NYSE), announced on Jan. 28, 2026.
data.description: In a recent announcement, CGI (TSX: GIB.A) (NYSE: GIB) disclosed the approval for the renewal of its Normal Course Issuer Bid ("NCIB") by its Board of Directors, pending Toronto Stock approval. The stock market symbols for CGI are GIB.A on the TSX and GIB on the NYSE. The news was released on January 28, 2026, through cgi.com/newsroom.

data.title: Heron Finance's report analyzes 71 private credit funds, highlighting risk and performance trends.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, Heron Finance unveiled its latest State of Private Credit Benchmark Report for Q1 2026. This report provides an in-depth examination of risk and performance patterns in 71 renowned private credit funds globally. For a detailed analysis, including crucial insights and data, individuals are encouraged to access the report.

data.title: ECB's Cipollone emphasizes digital euro crucial for payment independence in a volatile world.
data.description: Piero Cipollone, a top executive at the European Central Bank, has emphasized the growing importance of a European-owned payments system due to increasing geopolitical tensions. Cipollone believes that having control over such a system is crucial for strategic reasons. This assertion comes at a time when global conflicts are escalating, highlighting the need for Europe to safeguard its financial infrastructure. Cipollone's comments underscore the potential risks associated with relying on external payment networks. By advocating for a European-controlled system, he aims to enhance the region's autonomy in the face of uncertain geopolitical landscapes. The push for autonomy in payment systems becomes even more significant as geopolitical pressures continue to rise, emphasizing the urgency for Europe to prioritize strategic financial independence.

data.title: ASML stock surges on strong sales forecast for 2026, posting gains after providing positive outlook.
data.description: ASML, a major player in the semiconductor equipment industry, has reported a positive forecast for the ongoing quarter and the full year. This upbeat outlook has resulted in a surge in ASML's stock value. The company anticipates strong sales for 2026, sparking investor interest and driving the stock price higher.

data.title: Robo.ai and Tachyon9 form joint venture for AI infrastructure deployment, subsidiary Robo.ai Investments L.L.C.-FZ involved.
data.description: In Dubai, United Arab Emirates on January 28, 2026, technology company Robo.ai Inc. (NASDAQ: AIIO) revealed the establishment of a new joint venture. The subsidiary, Robo.ai Investments L.L.C.-FZ, is focused on the AI machine economy. The venture aims to combine expertise and resources with a yet-to-be-named partner.

data.title: Quarterly earnings estimates for various companies with revenue projections before January 28, 2026.
data.description: A number of companies are scheduled to report their quarterly earnings before the bell, with estimates for key metrics. VF is estimated to report earnings per share at $0.43 on revenue of $2.76 billion, Elevance Health at $3.10 per share on revenue of $49.47 billion, and Danaher at $2.17 per share on revenue of $6.80 billion, among others. Other companies like Starbucks are expected to report earnings at $0.58 per share on revenue of $9.64 billion, General Dynamics at $4.11 per share on revenue of $13.78 billion, and AT&T at $0.47 per share on revenue of $32.83 billion. These are some of the many companies listed in the article that are anticipated to release their financial results.

data.description: Investors in the Bitcoin ETF are facing the challenge of the price dropping to the total entry level of $XX. However, a cryptocurrency executive stated that there is optimism as a significant number of new institutions are showing interest in entering the market.

data.title: Epson's POS receipt printers enhance LaunderPay for laundry businesses, offering print reliability. Calif., Jan. 28, 2026.
data.description: Epson has introduced its point-of-sale (POS) receipt printers for wash-and-fold, laundry delivery, and dry-cleaning businesses in Los Alamitos, California. This move, revealed on January 28, 2026, aims to enhance print reliability in order management and payment systems. Epson's printers are now playing a crucial role in streamlining operations for these businesses.

data.title: Otis reports 4th Qtr 2025 results: Net sales up 3%, Service net sales up 8%, Maintenance and repair sales up 7%.	animorganic sales up 5%.
data.description: In the fourth quarter of 2025, Otis reported promising financial results, with a 3% increase in net sales and a 1% growth in organic sales. This growth was primarily propelled by an 8% rise in Service net sales, along with a notable 5% increase in organic sales within this segment. Additionally, Maintenance and repair sales saw a significant uptick of 7%, with organic sales up by 5%. Looking ahead to 2026, Otis has unveiled an optimistic outlook based on the momentum of its Service strategy, indicating a strong focus on this area for future growth.
